title: Omwatese

'''Omwatese''' was the native language of the [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Omwat/Legends|Omwat]]. Omwatese used some odd tonal inflections, but was nevertheless considered an elegant language. The language had a [[Written Omwatese|written form]]<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

There was a written form of Omwatese, which used a flowing script and letters that had to be combined to form words.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Most Omwati were fluent in both Omwatese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], being literate in both languages.

After [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] came to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in search of a child who could be molded into a genius, the word "Tarkin" was absorbed in to the language as another word for Demon.

{{Language-stub}}
